notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, was moved, or is temporarily unavailable.
errorDesc: The page doesn't exist or an unexpected error occurred.
exploreDesc: Discover new pages and content across the platform.
fastNavDesc: Jump back quickly and continue where you left off.
needHelpDesc: Reach out to support if the issue continues.
inviteComplete: Complete signup/login to accept the invitation.
signupDialogDesc: You need to create an account first to accept this invitation. After signup and login, you will be redirected back to this invitation automatically.
inviteAcceptedDesc: You have joined the workspace successfully. Continue to the homepage — sign in any time to open your dashboard and workspaces.
